# BP-8 positive: deferred unlock on mutex copy
lang: go
file: BP-8-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

func UnlockCopy(mu sync.Mutex) {
	mu.Lock()
	defer mu.Unlock()
}

// UnlockOriginal is safe even though this file also has a copied mutex parameter.
func UnlockOriginal(mu *sync.Mutex) {
	mu.Lock()
	defer mu.Unlock()
}
